scope: Post-Phase K through M product convergence, non-production integration, controlled pilot operations, and production readiness

status_policy.rationale: Mitigated and accepted risks retain a future observation or resolution work unit; only resolved records have completed resolution evidence.

risks.description: cau_003 still requires duplicate-evidence review before it can be exposed.
risks.resolution_evidence: H fixture evidence exercises the existing detail and attachment extractor. The bounded live closure confirmed that cau_003's current generic list candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings without source-specific configuration; duplicate evidence remains review-only. Post-Phase M: M established exact cau_003 attribution but the only matched tuition-payment security notice was not scholarship-relevant. The mistaken approve remains in history and an append-only reject is now effective; publication remained disabled.
risks.evidence: H fixture evidence exercises the existing detail and attachment extractor. The bounded live closure confirmed that cau_003's current generic list candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings without source-specific configuration; duplicate evidence remains review-only. Post-Phase M: M established exact cau_003 attribution but the only matched tuition-payment security notice was not scholarship-relevant. The mistaken approve remains in history and an append-only reject is now effective; publication remained disabled.
risks.deferral_reason: Exact adapter attribution is proven, but the only M match was a scholarship false positive and duplicate governance remains future work.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Retain exact attribution, test a true scholarship corpus, and exercise duplicate comparison only on scholarship-relevant evidence.
risks.success_criteria: A bounded true-positive cau_003 notice is relevance-qualified before any duplicate review or preview approval.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The effective reject corrects exposure risk without proving a true scholarship corpus or completing duplicate governance.

risks.description: cau_012 source coverage remains incomplete and is not represented as absence evidence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: cau_012 is absent from the committed source inventory; bounded crawl evidence cannot establish canonical identity.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded coverage evidence records cau_012 as absent from the committed source inventory and preserves that this is not source-absence evidence. Post-Phase M: M found no exact cau_012 inventory row, did not create the source, and retained source_absence_proven=false.
risks.deferral_reason: cau_012 is absent from the committed source inventory; bounded crawl evidence cannot establish canonical identity.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Source identity inventory alignment and bounded coverage evidence
risks.success_criteria: Bounded source coverage evidence is captured with an explicit result classification.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase H bounded coverage evidence records cau_012 as absent from the committed source inventory and preserves that this is not source-absence evidence. Post-Phase M: M found no exact cau_012 inventory row, did not create the source, and retained source_absence_proven=false.

risks.description: cau_008 has incomplete batch evidence and remains hidden from public exposure.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent, so attachment candidates cannot be credited as notice attachments. Download and attachment content interpretation remain out of scope.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but did not establish attributable notice attachments because source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent. Post-Phase M: M corrected cau_008 board extraction and observed 30 bounded list items in both cycles with zero scholarship matches; this is not absence evidence.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent, so attachment candidates cannot be credited as notice attachments. Download and attachment content interpretation remain out of scope.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Source-specific list-to-detail mapping, attachment/parser convergence, and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: A source-specific notice mapping and bounded recheck produce attributable attachment metadata, or a documented exception resolves the incomplete-batch state.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but did not establish attributable notice attachments because source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent. Post-Phase M: M corrected cau_008 board extraction and observed 30 bounded list items in both cycles with zero scholarship matches; this is not absence evidence.

risks.description: Attachment extraction and download verification are not complete.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H performs metadata-only evidence and does not download or interpret complex attachment content.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records metadata-only attachment evidence and explicitly excludes attachment download and complex-content interpretation. Post-Phase M: M attributable notices had body evidence but no asset metadata; complex attachment parsing remains unproven.
risks.deferral_reason: H performs metadata-only evidence and does not download or interpret complex attachment content.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Attachment/parser convergence with deterministic extraction evidence and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: Complex attachment cases have deterministic extraction evidence and explicit review handling.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase H validation records metadata-only attachment evidence and explicitly excludes attachment download and complex-content interpretation. Post-Phase M: M attributable notices had body evidence but no asset metadata; complex attachment parsing remains unproven.

risks.description: cau_007 zero-match observation is not proof of source exhaustion or scholarship absence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No bounded cau_007 scholarship true positive has been observed.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses but records that generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings. Post-Phase M: M remediated cau_007 source-specific list-to-detail attribution, but the resulting tuition-payment security notice was a scholarship false positive. Attribution success is not scholarship expansion success; append-only reject is effective.
risks.deferral_reason: Source-specific attribution is now repeatable, but the observed item was a semantic false positive rather than scholarship expansion evidence.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Retain the source-specific adapter and run a bounded relevance-qualified corpus recheck without treating zero match as absence.
risks.success_criteria: A bounded cau_007 run records either a scholarship true positive or an explicit zero-match observation with no absence inference.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses but records that generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings. Post-Phase M: M remediated cau_007 source-specific list-to-detail attribution, but the resulting tuition-payment security notice was a scholarship false positive. Attribution success is not scholarship expansion success; append-only reject is effective.

risks.description: Contextual keyword detection can still miss or overclassify scholarship notices.
risks.resolution_evidence: H classifies bounded candidates as contextual_only or insufficient_evidence and leaves the production detector unchanged. Post-Phase M: M proved that standalone tuition matching misclassified two attributable payment-security notices and that both were mistakenly approved. A reason-coded non-production relevance gate now blocks approval and append-only reject events supersede the approvals; production detector porting remains future work.
risks.evidence: H classifies bounded candidates as contextual_only or insufficient_evidence and leaves the production detector unchanged. Post-Phase M: M proved that standalone tuition matching misclassified two attributable payment-security notices and that both were mistakenly approved. A reason-coded non-production relevance gate now blocks approval and append-only reject events supersede the approvals; production detector porting remains future work.
risks.deferral_reason: The M relevance gate corrects the demonstrated non-production false positives, but production detector precision and recall remain unevaluated.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Run a labeled scholarship relevance shadow corpus, measure precision and recall, and separately approve any production detector port.
risks.success_criteria: The corpus reports precision and recall, standalone tuition notices cannot be approved, and production porting has a named owner and rollback plan.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The production detector was intentionally unchanged and requires an owned shadow corpus before porting.

risks.description: The available fixture subset is not nationwide scholarship coverage.
risks.resolution_evidence: H records a four-source bounded fixture comparison and a live closure. cau_002 failed closed on local TLS certificate verification, while three generic list mappings remain unverified; the non-completeness limitation is preserved. Post-Phase M: M expanded from three to six controlled sources, while explicitly preserving blocked and zero-match outcomes without absence inference.
risks.evidence: H records a four-source bounded fixture comparison and a live closure. cau_002 failed closed on local TLS certificate verification, while three generic list mappings remain unverified; the non-completeness limitation is preserved. Post-Phase M: M expanded from three to six controlled sources, while explicitly preserving blocked and zero-match outcomes without absence inference.
risks.deferral_reason: The accepted bounded-coverage boundary prevents overclaiming but does not establish nationwide source coverage.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Bounded source coverage expansion and observation-window recheck
risks.success_criteria: Coverage claims are tied to a published bounded source inventory and observation window.

risks.description: The G verification environment resolved @next/env, sharp, and unrs-resolver bootstrap concerns.
risks.success_criteria: A standard Node and package-manager environment completes the documented build verification.

risks.description: Review decisions are read-only diagnostics and are not persisted.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J defines append-only review decision events, evidence references, effective-decision projection, compatibility boundaries, and rollback design; implementation remains separately gated. Post-Phase M: M exercised needs_review and approve as append-only events for two expansion sources and verified update/delete rejection in the authorized non-production project.
risks.deferral_reason: The design is complete but no target inventory, migration, persistence implementation, or rehearsal is authorized.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Implement and rehearse the approved review event and effective projection model
risks.success_criteria: An approved schema and auditable review-decision lifecycle are implemented and reviewed.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase J defines append-only review decision events, evidence references, effective-decision projection, compatibility boundaries, and rollback design; implementation remains separately gated. Post-Phase M: M exercised needs_review and approve as append-only events for two expansion sources and verified update/delete rejection in the authorized non-production project.

risks.description: The normalized graph has not been approved or migrated into the production schema.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J provides the additive graph schema proposal, consumer compatibility matrix, migration gates, backfill plan, and rollback design. Post-Phase M: L schema rollback/reapply passed and M reused that schema for two cycles, but no production schema fingerprint or migration review exists.
risks.deferral_reason: Target schema inventory, final SQL, RLS review, and non-production rehearsal remain absent.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Approve target-aligned graph migration SQL and non-production rehearsal
risks.success_criteria: A schema proposal is approved with compatibility, rollback, and migration plans.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase J provides the additive graph schema proposal, consumer compatibility matrix, migration gates, backfill plan, and rollback design. Post-Phase M: L schema rollback/reapply passed and M reused that schema for two cycles, but no production schema fingerprint or migration review exists.

risks.description: No production apply path is approved or implemented.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J defines explicit allowlist, confirmation, plan/apply separation, fingerprint, audit, stop, rollback, and reconciliation gates. Post-Phase M: M performed no production read/write and records production rollout HOLD; production apply authority remains absent.
risks.deferral_reason: No executable apply path, target inventory, rehearsal, or production authorization exists.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Implement and rehearse guarded apply controls in non-production
risks.success_criteria: A separately approved guarded apply design passes dry-run, audit, and rollback review.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase J defines explicit allowlist, confirmation, plan/apply separation, fingerprint, audit, stop, rollback, and reconciliation gates. Post-Phase M: M performed no production read/write and records production rollout HOLD; production apply authority remains absent.

risks.description: The production build observed a warning that public.site_settings was absent from the schema cache.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H does not inspect or migrate the target environment schema.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase G build verification observed the public.site_settings schema-cache warning without inspecting the target environment.
risks.deferral_reason: H does not inspect or migrate the target environment schema.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Collect sanitized schema-cache evidence and prepare target-aligned remediation
risks.success_criteria: Confirm whether site_settings exists in the target environment schema; if needed, prepare a migration and compatibility plan.

risks.description: Deterministic replay validates evidence and policy contracts but not external model quality, prompt robustness, outage behavior, cost, latency, or version drift.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No provider credential or live call is used in the bounded prototype; automatic decisions and persistence remain prohibited.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase I deterministic replay validates the evidence and policy contract with zero external provider calls and no persistence. Post-Phase M: M made zero external LLM calls and added no LLM persistence; provider governance remains unevaluated.
risks.deferral_reason: No provider credential or live call is used in the bounded prototype; automatic decisions and persistence remain prohibited.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Provider audit, privacy, cost, and production-readiness evaluation
risks.success_criteria: A separately approved provider evaluation records quality, citation correctness, prompt-injection resistance, outage fallback, privacy, latency, and cost evidence without enabling automatic approval.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase I deterministic replay validates the evidence and policy contract with zero external provider calls and no persistence. Post-Phase M: M made zero external LLM calls and added no LLM persistence; provider governance remains unevaluated.

risks.description: The main-repository ESLint baseline has eleven existing errors and five warnings outside the K change set.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: K does not widen product convergence into unrelated application-wide lint remediation; all K-changed TypeScript files pass direct ESLint.
risks.evidence: K full lint reports eleven errors and five warnings outside the changed-file set, while focused K ESLint passes with zero findings. Post-Phase M: M reproduced 11 errors and 5 warnings, removed seven deterministic errors and all warnings, and explicitly baselined four react-hooks/set-state-in-effect findings with no M-introduced finding.
risks.deferral_reason: K does not widen product convergence into unrelated application-wide lint remediation; all K-changed TypeScript files pass direct ESLint.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Main repository lint baseline remediation
risks.success_criteria: Main ESLint errors are remediated or explicitly baselined without introducing new errors in later phase changes.
risks.resolution_evidence: K full lint reports eleven errors and five warnings outside the changed-file set, while focused K ESLint passes with zero findings. Post-Phase M: M reproduced 11 errors and 5 warnings, removed seven deterministic errors and all warnings, and explicitly baselined four react-hooks/set-state-in-effect findings with no M-introduced finding.

risks.description: Target-environment schema, migration history, row-count, RLS, and schema-cache evidence is unavailable.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J repository inventory explicitly distinguishes committed migrations, generated types, runtime expectations, and unknown target state.
risks.deferral_reason: J prohibits production/staging database access and requests sanitized metadata from an authorized operator.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: J prohibits production/staging database access and requests sanitized metadata from an authorized operator.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: J-M0 sanitized target schema inventory gate
risks.success_criteria: A redacted target inventory and stable schema fingerprint satisfy J-M0.

risks.description: Committed migrations do not fully reproduce generated-type and runtime table expectations.

risks.deferral_reason: Only target migration history and schema metadata can resolve the divergence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: Only target migration history and schema metadata can resolve the divergence.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Compare J-M0 inventory with committed migration history before SQL review

risks.description: Legacy records can lack stable article IDs, canonical URLs, source mappings, or attributable provenance.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J backfill plan defines exact mapping, review, ambiguity, missing-source, missing-evidence, and legacy-public-only classes.
risks.deferral_reason: No backfill inventory or human-reviewed exception set is authorized in J.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No backfill inventory or human-reviewed exception set is authorized in J.

risks.next_work_unit: J-M3 bounded backfill dry-run and exception review
risks.success_criteria: Dry-run has deterministic class counts and zero unresolved records proposed for apply.

risks.description: New graph/event/projection policies may not be compatible with existing admin and public access paths.
risks.evidence: notice_sources has committed RLS policies, while target policies for other required tables remain unknown.
risks.deferral_reason: J does not access target policy metadata or implement policies.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: J does not access target policy metadata or implement policies.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: J-M0 policy inventory and additive RLS review
risks.success_criteria: Authorized policy review proves least-privilege graph/admin/public paths in non-production.

risks.description: Effective approved review states may not map one-to-one to existing scholarship rows without duplicate or route regression.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase J preserves scholarships numeric IDs and defines a future projection mapping with unique and reconciliation constraints. Post-Phase M: M created only hidden preview rows and verified public leakage and automatic publish counts remained zero.
risks.deferral_reason: No projection implementation, backfill, or public reconciliation rehearsal is authorized.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No projection implementation, backfill, or public reconciliation rehearsal is authorized.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: J-M5 public projection integration rehearsal
risks.success_criteria: A non-production replay preserves every existing public ID and emits no duplicate projection.
risks.resolution_evidence: Post-Phase J preserves scholarships numeric IDs and defines a future projection mapping with unique and reconciliation constraints. Post-Phase M: M created only hidden preview rows and verified public leakage and automatic publish counts remained zero.

risks.description: Report-backed G public data can be mistaken for live crawler output or a DB-backed public projection.
risks.evidence: K adds public snapshot status, fail-closed scope, hidden-item count, and attachment verification limits to the existing list and detail routes. Post-Phase M: M reports distinguish live attributable, blocked transport, zero-match observation, hidden preview, and production HOLD states.
risks.deferral_reason: The UI is now truthful, but a controlled DB-backed public projection does not exist yet.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Controlled public projection preview and report-to-projection parity reconciliation
risks.success_criteria: A non-production controlled projection reconciles the selected cohort without blocked, unresolved, or report-only leakage.
risks.resolution_evidence: K adds public snapshot status, fail-closed scope, hidden-item count, and attachment verification limits to the existing list and detail routes. Post-Phase M: M reports distinguish live attributable, blocked transport, zero-match observation, hidden preview, and production HOLD states.

risks.description: The DB-backed crawled_notices lifecycle is mutable legacy compatibility behavior, not an append-only review-decision history.
risks.evidence: K labels the compatibility lifecycle in the queue/detail UI, blocks direct re-promotion in route and server actions, and permits restore only for rejected unlinked rows. Post-Phase M: M reconciled mutable compatibility content without changing legacy review status or reviewer metadata; canonical review decisions remained append-only.
risks.deferral_reason: Append-only events and an effective-decision projection require authorized target inventory and additive implementation.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Implement review events, parity comparison, and compatibility projection in non-production
risks.success_criteria: Reviewers can inspect immutable decision history and the legacy queue remains compatible until approved cutover.
risks.resolution_evidence: K labels the compatibility lifecycle in the queue/detail UI, blocks direct re-promotion in route and server actions, and permits restore only for rejected unlinked rows. Post-Phase M: M reconciled mutable compatibility content without changing legacy review status or reviewer metadata; canonical review decisions remained append-only.

risks.description: Duplicate capability ownership, source_id/source_key confusion, or fuzzy source matching could cause incorrect source attribution.
risks.evidence: K fixes a one-owner convergence decision for each critical capability and records exact source resolution as a port decision. Post-Phase M: All six M source keys exact-matched canonical source_id; fuzzy matching and automatic source creation stayed zero.
risks.deferral_reason: The target source inventory and integrated resolver implementation are not authorized in K.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Port exact source resolution and enforce one canonical owner per integrated capability
risks.success_criteria: Selected cohort records resolve source_key only through exact mapping to notice_sources.source_id, with zero fuzzy or automatic-creation paths.
risks.resolution_evidence: K fixes a one-owner convergence decision for each critical capability and records exact source resolution as a port decision. Post-Phase M: All six M source keys exact-matched canonical source_id; fuzzy matching and automatic source creation stayed zero.

risks.description: Stale reports, missing body/attachment evidence, zero matches, or source failures could be presented as successful ingestion or public availability.
risks.evidence: K makes report-backed diagnostics read-only, exposes evidence availability in review, and preserves fail-closed public filtering. Post-Phase M: Two dated cycle artifacts and runtime readbacks preserve source outcomes; public leakage stayed zero.
risks.deferral_reason: Integrated live run evidence and source-health persistence are Phase L work.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Run-evidence integration, source-health visibility, and controlled projection reconciliation
risks.success_criteria: Every pilot result has attributable body/asset/run state or an explicit blocked/unavailable state with no public leakage.
risks.resolution_evidence: K makes report-backed diagnostics read-only, exposes evidence availability in review, and preserves fail-closed public filtering. Post-Phase M: Two dated cycle artifacts and runtime readbacks preserve source outcomes; public leakage stayed zero.

risks.description: Selective personal-engine ports can diverge from main consumers, route compatibility, or the canonical source contract.
risks.evidence: K records reuse/port/merge decisions and target code boundaries instead of copying the personal repository wholesale. Post-Phase M: M ported only three source-specific extraction capabilities and proved them through the integrated L graph path.
risks.deferral_reason: The selected contracts require integrated implementation and cohort replay before equivalence can be proven.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Implement the fixed convergence matrix in main and reconcile graph-to-legacy behavior
risks.success_criteria: Selected cohort replay proves source, review, public-route, and rollback compatibility for every ported or merged capability.
risks.resolution_evidence: K records reuse/port/merge decisions and target code boundaries instead of copying the personal repository wholesale. Post-Phase M: M ported only three source-specific extraction capabilities and proved them through the integrated L graph path.

risks.description: A three-source pilot can prove an integration path but cannot establish broad source coverage or parser completeness.
risks.evidence: K selects cau_001, cau_002, and yonsei_060 for distinct normal, no-assets/blocked, and source-specific adapter conditions. Post-Phase M: M executed two identical six-source bounded cycles. cau_003 and cau_007 were attributable in both cycles; cau_002 remained transport-blocked and cau_008/yonsei_060 remained zero-match observations.
risks.deferral_reason: The pilot is intentionally bounded to preserve speed and a coherent Phase L integration surface.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Expand the operating cohort against measured coverage, unresolved, retry, and review-latency thresholds
risks.success_criteria: A measured operating cohort expands only after defined source-health and review thresholds are met.
risks.resolution_evidence: K selects cau_001, cau_002, and yonsei_060 for distinct normal, no-assets/blocked, and source-specific adapter conditions. Post-Phase M: M executed two identical six-source bounded cycles. cau_003 and cau_007 were attributable in both cycles; cau_002 remained transport-blocked and cau_008/yonsei_060 remained zero-match observations.

risks.description: Target-schema authority, authenticated admin browser evidence, and non-production environment access can be unavailable during local convergence work.

risks.deferral_reason: K does not request credentials, access production data, or perform migration work.

risks.resolution_evidence: K preserves a local read-only public walkthrough and records that L implementation must obtain authorized target inventory and environment authority. Post-Phase M: M used only the authorized L project and requires a real authenticated browser artifact before final validation.

risks.description: cau_002 cannot establish live evidence because certificate verification blocks transport.
risks.evidence: Both M cycles classified cau_002 as blocked_transport with no notice or public item.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: Disabling TLS verification is not an acceptable remediation and the remote certificate chain is outside repository authority.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Establish a trusted CA path or source-approved transport alternative and run a bounded attributable recheck.
risks.success_criteria: A bounded run reaches the exact source over verified TLS and records an explicit attributable or zero-match result.
risks.deferral_reason: Disabling TLS verification is not an acceptable remediation and the remote certificate chain is outside repository authority.
risks.resolution_evidence: Both M cycles classified cau_002 as blocked_transport with no notice or public item.

risks.description: A run containing reviewed revisions cannot use the generic bounded rollback path because review_items retains the current revision FK.
risks.evidence: The reviewed cycle-2 rollback probe still aborts transactionally. Separately, M rolled back an explicitly labeled unreviewed data-bearing fixture and deleted 1 notice, 1 occurrence, 1 revision, and 1 compatibility row before deterministic reapply with no unrelated changes.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: Deleting reviewed evidence conflicts with append-only review preservation and requires an explicit archival/rollback policy.
risks.next_resolution_phase: Post-Phase N - Production Readiness and Controlled Expansion
risks.next_work_unit: Define reviewed-run rollback as logical supersession or archival and add a focused rehearsal.
risks.success_criteria: A reviewed-run recovery procedure preserves immutable events and reaches deterministic state without FK failure or unrelated mutation.
risks.deferral_reason: Deleting reviewed evidence conflicts with append-only review preservation and requires an explicit archival/rollback policy.
risks.resolution_evidence: The reviewed cycle-2 rollback probe still aborts transactionally. Separately, M rolled back an explicitly labeled unreviewed data-bearing fixture and deleted 1 notice, 1 occurrence, 1 revision, and 1 compatibility row before deterministic reapply with no unrelated changes.
